english translation text: Ziyarat of Ta`ziyah (Condolences)

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صِفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Adam, the select of Allah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Noah, the prophet of Allah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهيمَ خَليلِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Abraham, the intimate friend of Allah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Moses, who received direct communication from Allah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Jesus, the Spirit of Allah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Muhammad, the most beloved by Allah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَلِيٍّ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنينَ وَلِيِّ اللّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Ali, the Commander of the Believers and the intimate servant of Allah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلْحَسَنِ ٱلشَّهيدِ سِبْطِ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O inheritor of Al-Hasan, the martyr and grandson of Allah’s Messenger!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O son of Allah’s Messenger!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلْبَشِيرِ ٱلنَّذِيرِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O son of the bringer of glad tidings and the warner

arabic text: وَٱبْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
english translation text: and son of the chief of the prophets’ successors!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O son of Fatimah, the doyenne of the women of the world!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O Abu-`Abdillah!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يا خِيَرَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خِيَرَتِهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O select of Allah and the son of His select ones!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O revenge of Allah and the son of His revenge!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْوِتْرُ ٱلْمَوْتُورُ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O unique (in suffering tribulations) and the oppressed!

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْهَادِي ٱلزَّكِيُّ
english translation text: Peace be on You, O guide, pure leader!

arabic text: وَعَلىٰ أَرْوَاحٍ حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ وَأَقَامَتْ فِي جِوَارِكَ
english translation text: and on the souls of those who presented themselves in Your camp, resided in Your vicinity,

arabic text: وَوَفَدَتْ مَعَ زُوَّارِكَ
english translation text: and came with the visitors of You.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنِّي مَا بَقيتُ وَبَقِيَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, from me, as long as I am alive and as long as there are day and night.

arabic text: فَلَقَدْ عَظُمَتْ بِكَ ٱلرَّزِيَّةُ
english translation text: Verily, astounding has been the calamity for us

arabic text: وَجَلَّ ٱلْمُصَابُ فِي ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
english translation text: and unbearable has been the adversity for the believers, Muslims,

arabic text: وَفِي أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text: for all the inhabitants of the heavens,

arabic text: وَفِي سُكَّانِ ٱلاَرَضِينَ
english translation text: and for the inhabitants of the layers of the earth.

arabic text: فَإِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ
english translation text: So, we are Allah’s and verily unto Him we return.

arabic text: وَصَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ وَتَحِيَّاتُهُ عَلَيْكَ
english translation text: And Allah’s peace, blessings, and benedictions be upon You,

arabic text: وَعَلَىٰ آبَائِكَ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ ٱلطَّيِّبِينَ ٱلْمُنْتَجَبِينَ
english translation text: upon Your forefathers; the pure, the pious, and the elite,

arabic text: وَعَلىٰ ذَرَارِيهِمُ ٱلْهُدَاةِ ٱلْمَهْدِيِّينَ
english translation text: and upon their offspring; the guides and well-guided.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ وَعَلَيْهِمْ
english translation text: Peace be upon You O my master, upon them,

arabic text: وَعَلَىٰ رُوحِكَ وَعَلَىٰ أَرْوَاحِهِمْ
english translation text: upon Your soul, upon their souls,

arabic text: وَعَلَىٰ تُرْبَتِكَ وَعَلَىٰ تُرْبَتِهِمْ
english translation text: upon the soil in which You are buried, and upon the soil in which they are buried.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ لَقِّهِمْ رَحْمَةً وَرِضْوَاناً
english translation text: O Allah, please shed over them mercy, pleasure of You,

arabic text: وَرَوْحاً وَرَيْحَاناً
english translation text: happiness, and bounty.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, my master Abu-`Abdillah;

arabic text: يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
english translation text: O Son of the Seal of the Prophets,

arabic text: وَيَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
english translation text: O Son of the Chief of the Prophets’ successors,

arabic text: وَيَا بْنَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمينَ
english translation text: and O Son of the doyenne of the women of the world.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا شَهِيدُ يَا بْنَ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, O martyr, Son of the martyr,

arabic text: يَا أَخَا ٱلشَّهيدِ يَا أَبَا ٱلشُّهَدَاءِ
english translation text: O Brother of the martyr, and father of the martyrs.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْهُ عَنِّي فِي هٰذِهِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ
english translation text: O Allah, please do convey to him on behalf of me at this hour,

arabic text: وَفِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ
english translation text: on this day,

arabic text: وَفِي هٰذَا ٱلْوَقْتِ
english translation text: at this moment,

arabic text: وَفِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ
english translation text: and at all time

arabic text: تَحِيَّةً كَثيرَةً وَسَلاماً
english translation text: abundant greetings and salutations.

arabic text: سَلاَمُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكِ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
english translation text: Peace, mercy, and blessings of Allah be upon You,

arabic text: يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text: O Son of the master of the nations,

arabic text: وَعَلَىٰ ٱلْمُسْتَشْهَدِينَ مَعَكَ سَلاَماً مُتَّصِلاً
english translation text: and upon those whom were martyred with You by such incessant greetings

arabic text: مَا ٱتَّصَلَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهارُ
english translation text: that endure as long as there are day and night.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
english translation text: Peace be upon Al-Husayn, the son of Ali, the martyr.

arabic text: السَّلامُ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
english translation text: Peace be upon Ali, the son of Al-Husayn, the martyr.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
english translation text: Peace be upon Al-`Abbas, the son of the Commander of the Believers, the martyr.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَداءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon the martyrs from among the descendants of the Commander of the Believers.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَداءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ ٱلْحَسَنِ
english translation text: Peace be upon the martyrs from among the descendants of Al-Hasan.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَداءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: Peace be upon the martyrs from among the descendants of Al-Husayn.

arabic text: السَّلامُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَداءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ جَعْفَرٍ وَعَقِيلٍ
english translation text: Peace be upon the martyrs from among the descendants of Ja`far and `Aqil.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ مُسْتَشْهَدٍ مَعَهُمْ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon all the believers whom were martyred with them.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: O Allah, please send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

arabic text: وَبَلِّغْهُمْ عَنِّي تَحِيَّةً كَثِيرَةً وَسَلاَماً
english translation text: and convey to them abundant greetings and salutations on behalf of me.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, O Allah’s Messenger!

arabic text: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي وَلَدِكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: May Allah confer upon You excellent consolation concerning the tragedy of Al-Husayn, Your son.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا فَاطِمَةُ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, O Fatimah!

arabic text: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكِ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي وَلَدِكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: May Allah confer upon You excellent consolation concerning the tragedy of Al-Husayn, Your son.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِيرَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, O Commander of the Believers!

arabic text: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي وَلَدِكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: May Allah confer upon You excellent consolation concerning the tragedy of Al-Husayn, Your son.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنُ
english translation text: Peace be upon You, Aba-Muhammad Al-Hasan!

arabic text: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي أَخِيكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
english translation text: May Allah confer upon You excellent consolation concerning the tragedy of Al-Husayn, Your brother

arabic text: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: O my master, Abu-`Abdillah!

arabic text: أَنَاَ ضَيْفُ ٱللَّهِ وَضَيْفُكَ
english translation text: I am now Allah’s and Your guest

arabic text: وَجَارُ ٱللَّهِ وَجَارُكَ
english translation text: and Allah’s and Your neighbor!

arabic text: وَلِكُلِّ ضَيْفٍ وَجَارٍ قِرَىً
english translation text: Each guest and neighbor must receive hospitality!

arabic text: وَقِرَايَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْوَقْتِ
english translation text: My hospitality at this time

arabic text: أَنْ تَسْأَلَ ٱللَّهَ سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَىٰ
english translation text: is that You may beseech Almighty Allah

arabic text: أَنْ يَرْزُقَنِي فَكَاكَ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
english translation text: to release me from Hellfire.

arabic text: إِنَّهُ سَمِيعُ ٱلدُّعَاءِ قَرِيبٌ مُجِيبٌ
english translation text: Verily, He is Hearer of prayers, Nigh, and Responsive.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
